fields.label: Global Clinic Schema Location
fields.name: schema_display_pages
fields.instructions: Default: Front Page - Select additional pages for global schema to appear on.

fields.label: Custom Fragment
fields.name: clinic_fragment_id
fields.instructions: You are telling Google: "This ID doesn't represent the page itself; it represents the Medical Clinic that exists at this address". Critical in 2026. Defaults to #main-clinic

fields.label: Clinic Gallery
fields.name: clinic_gallery
fields.instructions: Suggested 10-20 images distribute your gallery across exterior, interior, service, team, behind the scenes.

fields.label: Condition Providers
fields.name: treatment_providers
fields.instructions: Select providers who diagnose and treat this condition.

fields.label: Condition Clinical Name
fields.name: clinical_name
fields.instructions: Clinical name of the medical condition and / or treatment

fields.label: Alternate Names
fields.name: alternate_names
fields.instructions: Format: Ensure text are strings. e.g. "Acne Car Treatment" separated by commas.

fields.label: Condition Description
fields.name: condition_description
fields.instructions: Include a technical description of the condition.

fields.label: Associated Anatomy
fields.name: condition_associated_anatomy
fields.instructions: The anatomy of the underlying organ system or structures associated with this entity. If multiple enter line breaks.

fields.label: Differential Diagnosis
fields.name: condition_differential_diagnosis
fields.instructions: It lists conditions with similar symptoms (e.g., "Rosacea" or "Folliculitis"), demonstrating that the clinic understands the nuance of professional diagnosis.

fields.label: Epidemiology
fields.name: condition_epidemiology
fields.instructions: Who is typically affected (e.g., "Commonly affects adolescents and young adults") provides demographic context that search engines value for query matching.

fields.label: Risk Factor
fields.name: condition_risk_factor
fields.instructions: Listing common risk factors (e.g., "Hormonal changes", "Genetics") shows a comprehensive understanding of the condition's pathogenesis.

fields.label: Condition Signs & Sypmptoms
fields.name: condition_symptoms
fields.instructions: Symptoms are the subjective or objective evidence of a disease. These are the things a patient sees in the mirror or feels on their skin. Proves Experience (Clinical Observation).

fields.label: Condition Possible Treatments
fields.name: possible_treatments_repeater
fields.instructions: List possible treatments, link internally where possible.

sub_fields.label: Medical Procedure Type
sub_fields.name: medical_procedure_type
sub_fields.instructions: The type of procedure, for example Surgical, Noninvasive, or Percutaneous.

sub_fields.label: Internal Treatment Link
sub_fields.name: internal_treatment
sub_fields.instructions: Specify related treatment available at clinic.

sub_fields.label: Reference
sub_fields.name: reference
sub_fields.instructions: Property: sameAs. URL of a reference Web page that unambiguously indicates the item's identity. E.g. the URL of the item's Wikipedia page, Wikidata entry, or official website.

sub_fields.label: Same As
sub_fields.name: same_as
sub_fields.instructions: Authoritative sources that validate this condition - WikiData, WikiPedia, MayoClinic, PubMed, NIH, AAD.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: For conditions, the image should be a clear, clinical representation of the signs or symptoms mentioned in the schema.

fields.label: Procedure Providers
fields.name: treatment_providers
fields.instructions: Select providers who perform this procedure.

fields.label: Clinical Procedure Name
fields.name: clinical_name
fields.instructions: Clinical name of the medical condition and / or treatment

fields.label: Alternate Names
fields.name: alternate_names
fields.instructions: Format: Ensure text are strings. e.g. "Acne Car Treatment" separated by commas.

fields.label: Procedure Description
fields.name: procedure_description
fields.instructions: Include a technical description of the procedure.

fields.label: Medical Conditions
fields.name: medical_conditions_repeater
fields.instructions: List possible treatments, link internally where possible.

sub_fields.label: Internal Medical Condition
sub_fields.name: internal_condition
sub_fields.instructions: Specify related treatment available at clinic.

fields.label: Procedure Preparation
fields.name: procedure_preparation
fields.instructions: High E-E-A-T signal for "Patient Safety.
fields.default_value: Arrive with cleansed skin. Avoid blood thinners/alcohol for 24h. Take all regularly prescribed medications unless told otherwise.

fields.label: Procedure Follow-Up
fields.name: procedure_followup
fields.default_value: Keep site clean and moist with petroleum jelly. Apply SPF 30+. Avoid strenuous activity for 48h. Call if you experience severe pain or fever.

sub_fields.label: Same As
sub_fields.name: same_as
sub_fields.instructions: Authoritative sources that validate this condition - WikiData, WikiPedia, MayoClinic, PubMed, NIH, AAD.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: For conditions, the image should be a clear, clinical representation of the signs or symptoms mentioned in the schema.

fields.label: Name
fields.name: provider_name
fields.instructions: Property: name Example: Full name + primary degree (John Doe, MD)

fields.label: Job Title
fields.name: exact_job_title
fields.instructions: Property: jobTitle Example: Board-Certified Dermatologist

fields.label: USNPI
fields.name: provider_npi
fields.instructions: NPI Lookup: https://npiregistry.cms.hhs.gov/search

fields.label: Alumni Of
fields.name: education_history
fields.instructions: List all relevant medical institutions

fields.label: Educational Occupational Credential
fields.name: educational_occupational_credential
fields.instructions: List all relevant medical institutions
